question: How many products do we have?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(p.product_id) AS total_products
FROM product AS p
LIMIT 1000

question: List all active products
sql:
SELECT
  p.product_id,
  p.name,
  p.code,
  p.launch_date,
  p.shelf_life_months,
  p.description,
  p.strength
FROM product AS p
WHERE
  p.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: How many employees are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(e.employee_id)
FROM employee AS e
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all suppliers
sql:
SELECT
  supplier_id,
  country_id,
  is_approved,
  name,
  code,
  contact_name,
  phone,
  gmp_certified,
  approval_date,
  rating,
  contact_email
FROM supplier
LIMIT 1000

question: How many batches were produced in 2025?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(b.batch_id)
FROM batch AS b
WHERE
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM b.start_date) = 2025
LIMIT 1000

question: List all rejected batches
sql:
SELECT
  batch.batch_id,
  batch.order_id,
  batch.site_id,
  batch.line_id,
  batch.product_id,
  batch.released_by,
  batch.supervisor_id,
  batch.bom_id,
  batch.shift_type_id,
  batch.status,
  batch.batch_number,
  batch.released_date,
  batch.end_date,
  batch.start_date,
  batch.batch_size,
  batch.yield_quantity,
  batch.yield_pct
FROM batch
WHERE
  batch.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: How many scrap events happened?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS number_of_scrap_events
FROM scrap_event AS se
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all equipment types
sql:
SELECT
  et.equipment_type_id,
  et.name,
  et.description,
  et.category
FROM equipment_type AS et
LIMIT 1000

question: List all dosage forms
sql:
SELECT
  df.dosage_form_id,
  df.description,
  df.name
FROM dosage_form AS df
LIMIT 1000

question: How many raw materials are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(rm.material_id) AS number_of_raw_materials
FROM raw_material AS rm
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all defect types with severity critical
sql:
SELECT
  defect_type_id,
  severity,
  name,
  description,
  code
FROM defect_type
WHERE
  severity = 'critical'
LIMIT 1000

question: List all sites
sql:
SELECT
  site.site_id,
  site.country_id,
  site.name,
  site.address,
  site.code,
  site.max_capacity_units_per_day,
  site.gmp_certified
FROM site AS site
LIMIT 1000

question: How many production lines are active?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(pl.line_id) AS active_production_lines
FROM production_line AS pl
WHERE
  pl.status = 'active'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all scrap reasons in the equipment category
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name,
  sr.description
FROM scrap_reason AS sr
WHERE
  sr.category = 'equipment'
LIMIT 1000

question: What are the different shift types?
sql:
SELECT
  st.name
FROM shift_type AS st
LIMIT 1000

question: How many open deviations are there?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(d.deviation_id)
FROM deviation AS d
WHERE
  d.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: List all waste categories
sql:
SELECT
  waste_category.name
FROM waste_category
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with yield below 90%
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number,
  b.yield_pct
FROM batch AS b
WHERE
  b.yield_pct < 90
LIMIT 1000

question: How many customers do we have?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(c.customer_id)
FROM customer AS c
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total number of test types?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(tt.test_type_id) AS total_number_of_test_types
FROM test_type AS tt
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all batches with their product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.product_id,
  b.batch_id,
  b.bom_id,
  b.order_id,
  b.line_id,
  b.supervisor_id,
  b.site_id,
  b.released_by,
  b.shift_type_id,
  b.batch_number,
  b.yield_quantity,
  b.status,
  b.released_date,
  b.batch_size,
  b.yield_pct,
  b.end_date,
  b.start_date,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List employees and their departments
sql:
SELECT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM employee AS e
JOIN department AS d
  ON e.department_id = d.department_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events with their reason names
sql:
SELECT
  se.reason_id,
  se.scrap_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.step_id,
  se.batch_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.scrap_date,
  se.description,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.quantity,
  se.root_cause,
  se.corrective_action,
  sr.name AS reason_name
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which products are in the Analgesic category?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name
FROM product AS p
JOIN product_category AS pc
  ON p.category_id = pc.category_id
WHERE
  pc.name = 'Analgesic'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment with their type names
sql:
SELECT
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  et.name AS equipment_type_name
FROM equipment AS e
JOIN equipment_type AS et
  ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all suppliers from India
sql:
SELECT
  s.supplier_id,
  s.country_id,
  s.name,
  s.contact_email,
  s.contact_name,
  s.code,
  s.is_approved,
  s.phone,
  s.rating,
  s.approval_date,
  s.gmp_certified
FROM supplier AS s
WHERE
  s.contact_email LIKE '%.in'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with their production line names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number,
  pl.name AS production_line_name
FROM batch AS b
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost per batch?
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM batch AS b
JOIN scrap_event AS se
  ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
GROUP BY
  b.batch_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show deviations with their type names and severity
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  d.description,
  dt.name AS deviation_type_name,
  dt.severity
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all GMP certified suppliers with their country
sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  c.name AS country_name
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN country AS c
  ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE
  s.gmp_certified = TRUE
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batch yield by product name
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  AVG(byield.yield_pct) AS average_batch_yield_pct
FROM batch_yield AS byield
JOIN batch AS b
  ON byield.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY
  p.name
ORDER BY
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Which raw materials are classified as API?
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name
FROM raw_material AS rm
JOIN material_class AS mc
  ON rm.class_id = mc.class_id
WHERE
  mc.name = 'Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all approved material lots with their material names
sql:
SELECT
  ml.lot_id,
  ml.lot_number,
  rm.name AS material_name,
  ml.quantity_received,
  ml.quantity_available,
  ml.status,
  ml.approved_date
FROM material_lot AS ml
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
WHERE
  ml.status = 'approved'
LIMIT 1000

question: List QC test results that failed
sql:
SELECT
  qtr.result_id,
  qtr.test_type_id,
  qtr.reviewed_by,
  qtr.sample_id,
  qtr.tested_by,
  qtr.instrument_id,
  qtr.spec_id,
  qtr.passed,
  qtr.result_text,
  qtr.result_value,
  qtr.spec_min,
  qtr.spec_max,
  qtr.review_date,
  qtr.test_date
FROM qc_test_result AS qtr
WHERE
  qtr.passed = FALSE
LIMIT 1000

question: Show production orders with their product names
sql:
SELECT
  po.order_number,
  po.planned_quantity,
  po.status,
  po.planned_start_date,
  po.planned_end_date,
  po.actual_start_date,
  po.actual_end_date,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM production_order AS po
JOIN product AS p
  ON po.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the average batch yield per product?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  AVG(b.yield_pct) AS average_batch_yield
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: List all CAPAs that are still open
sql:
SELECT
  capa.deviation_id,
  capa.capa_id,
  capa.oos_id,
  capa.verified_by,
  capa.owner_id,
  capa.capa_type_id,
  capa.description,
  capa.status,
  capa.capa_number,
  capa.opened_date,
  capa.root_cause,
  capa.due_date,
  capa.proposed_action,
  capa.completed_date,
  capa.effectiveness_check,
  capa.verified_date,
  capa.actual_action
FROM capa
WHERE
  capa.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment maintenance records with equipment names
sql:
SELECT
  em.equipment_id,
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  em.maintenance_id,
  em.performed_by,
  em.maintenance_type_id,
  em.parts_replaced,
  em.status,
  em.findings,
  em.scheduled_date,
  em.cost,
  em.completed_date
FROM equipment_maintenance AS em
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON em.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which batches were supervised by John Anderson?
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number
FROM batch AS b
JOIN employee AS e
  ON b.supervisor_id = e.employee_id
WHERE
  e.first_name = 'John' AND e.last_name = 'Anderson'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show total scrap quantity by scrap reason
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name AS scrap_reason_name,
  SUM(se.quantity) AS total_scrap_quantity
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
GROUP BY
  sr.name
ORDER BY
  total_scrap_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events from the Morning shift with reason names and batch numbers
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name AS reason_name,
  b.batch_number
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM se.scrap_date) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM se.scrap_date) < 14
LIMIT 1000

question: List all batches of Paracetamol 500mg with their yield and production line
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  b.yield_quantity,
  b.yield_pct,
  pl.name AS production_line_name
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
WHERE
  p.name = 'Paracetamol' AND p.strength = '500mg'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment downtime with equipment name and type
sql:
SELECT
  ed.downtime_id,
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  et.name AS equipment_type,
  ed.start_time,
  ed.end_time,
  ed.category,
  ed.reason,
  ed.impact_batches
FROM equipment_downtime AS ed
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON ed.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
JOIN equipment_type AS et
  ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which suppliers provided materials used in rejected batches?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  s.name
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
  ON ml.lot_id = bmu.lot_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bmu.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events where the reason category is equipment and batch yield was below 95%
sql:
SELECT
  se.batch_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.equipment_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.scrap_id,
  se.shift_type_id,
  se.step_id,
  se.reported_by,
  se.description,
  se.root_cause,
  se.quantity,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.corrective_action,
  se.scrap_date
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  sr.category = 'equipment' AND b.yield_pct < 95.00
LIMIT 1000

question: List deviations with their CAPA status and batch product name
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM deviation AS d
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON d.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all batches produced at the US site with their product names and yields
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  b.yield_quantity,
  b.yield_pct
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON b.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE
  s.name = 'PharmaCorp US Plant'
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap cost by production line and product?
sql:
SELECT
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  p.name AS product_name,
  SUM(bc.amount) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  bc.cost_type = 'scrap'
GROUP BY
  pl.name,
  p.name
ORDER BY
  pl.name,
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show QC test results for batch BN-2025-001 with test type names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  qs.sample_number,
  tt.name AS test_type_name,
  qtr.result_value,
  qtr.result_text,
  qtr.spec_min,
  qtr.spec_max,
  qtr.passed,
  qtr.test_date
FROM qc_test_result AS qtr
JOIN qc_sample AS qs
  ON qtr.sample_id = qs.sample_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON qs.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN test_type AS tt
  ON qtr.test_type_id = tt.test_type_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-001'
LIMIT 1000

question: List employees who performed equipment maintenance and their department
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  e.first_name,
  e.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM equipment_maintenance AS em
JOIN employee AS e
  ON em.performed_by = e.employee_id
JOIN department AS d
  ON e.department_id = d.department_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show material lots that were rejected with supplier names and material names
sql:
SELECT
  ml.lot_number,
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  rm.name AS material_name
FROM material_lot AS ml
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
WHERE
  ml.status = 'rejected'
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost per site?
sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS site_name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN site AS s
  ON b.site_id = s.site_id
GROUP BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with their BOM details and product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  bom.bom_id,
  bom.version AS bom_version,
  bom.batch_size AS bom_batch_size,
  bom.status AS bom_status,
  bom.effective_date AS bom_effective_date
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN bill_of_materials AS bom
  ON b.bom_id = bom.bom_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all environmental monitoring readings that were out of spec with area names
sql:
SELECT
  em.monitoring_id,
  pa.name AS area_name,
  em.monitoring_date,
  em.temperature_c,
  em.humidity_pct,
  em.differential_pressure_pa,
  em.particle_count_05um,
  em.particle_count_5um
FROM environmental_monitoring AS em
JOIN production_area AS pa
  ON em.area_id = pa.area_id
WHERE
  em.within_spec = FALSE
LIMIT 1000

question: Show OEE records for Tablet Line 1 with equipment names
sql:
SELECT
  orcd.oee_id,
  orcd.equipment_id,
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  orcd.line_id,
  orcd.oee_pct,
  orcd.availability_pct,
  orcd.performance_pct,
  orcd.good_units_produced,
  orcd.total_units_produced,
  orcd.quality_pct,
  orcd.record_date,
  orcd.actual_runtime_minutes,
  orcd.planned_runtime_minutes
FROM oee_record AS orcd
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON orcd.line_id = pl.line_id
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON orcd.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
WHERE
  pl.name = 'Tablet Line 1'
LIMIT 1000

question: Which operators ran batches on the Morning shift that had scrap events?
sql:
WITH BatchesWithScrap AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        se.batch_id
    FROM
        scrap_event se
),
OperatorsInScrappedBatches AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        bse.performed_by AS operator_id,
        b.shift_type_id
    FROM
        batch_step_execution bse
    JOIN
        BatchesWithScrap bws ON bse.batch_id = bws.batch_id
    JOIN
        batch b ON bse.batch_id = b.batch_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    o.operator_id
FROM
    OperatorsInScrappedBatches o
WHERE
    o.shift_type_id = 1
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all complaints with product and customer names
sql:
SELECT
  c.complaint_id,
  c.batch_id,
  c.capa_id,
  c.complaint_type,
  c.description,
  c.complaint_number,
  c.reportable,
  c.status,
  c.root_cause,
  c.investigation,
  c.received_date,
  c.severity,
  c.closed_date,
  p.name AS product_name,
  cust.name AS customer_name
FROM complaint AS c
JOIN product AS p
  ON c.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN customer AS cust
  ON c.customer_id = cust.customer_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List batch costs broken down by cost type for rejected batches
sql:
SELECT
  bc.cost_type,
  SUM(bc.amount) AS total_cost
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bc.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
GROUP BY
  bc.cost_type
LIMIT 1000

question: Show process steps for Paracetamol 500mg with their parameters
sql:
SELECT
  ps.step_number,
  ps.name AS step_name,
  ps.description AS step_description,
  pp.name AS parameter_name,
  pp.min_value,
  pp.max_value,
  pp.target_value
FROM product AS p
JOIN master_batch_record AS mbr
  ON p.product_id = mbr.product_id
JOIN process_step AS ps
  ON mbr.mbr_id = ps.mbr_id
LEFT JOIN process_parameter AS pp
  ON ps.step_id = pp.step_id
WHERE
  p.name LIKE '%Paracetamol%' AND p.strength = '500mg'
ORDER BY
  ps.step_number,
  pp.name
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the average OEE by production line?
sql:
SELECT
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  AVG(o.oee_pct) AS average_oee
FROM oee_record AS o
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON o.line_id = pl.line_id
GROUP BY
  pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events with batch number, product name, line name, shift type, and scrap reason category
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  st.name AS shift_type,
  sr.category AS scrap_reason_category
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN shift_type AS st
  ON se.shift_type_id = st.shift_type_id
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show total quantity of materials received and how many lots were rejected
sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  SUM(ml.quantity_received) AS total_quantity_received,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ml.status = 'rejected' THEN ml.lot_id END) AS rejected_lots_count
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
GROUP BY
  s.name
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show deviations that led to CAPAs with the batch product name, deviation type, and CAPA owner name
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS batch_product_name,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS capa_owner_name
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON d.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON c.owner_id = e.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap rate by product and site for Q1 2025?
sql:
WITH Q1_2025_ScrapSummary AS (
    SELECT
        se.batch_id,
        SUM(se.quantity) AS total_scrap_quantity_per_batch
    FROM
        scrap_event se
    WHERE
        se.scrap_date >= '2025-01-01'::date
        AND se.scrap_date < '2025-04-01'::date
    GROUP BY
        se.batch_id
),
BatchDetails AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id,
        b.product_id,
        b.site_id,
        b.batch_size
    FROM
        batch b
    WHERE
        b.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM Q1_2025_ScrapSummary)
)
SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    s.name AS site_name,
    (SUM(qss.total_scrap_quantity_per_batch) * 100.0 / SUM(bd.batch_size)) AS scrap_rate_pct
FROM
    Q1_2025_ScrapSummary qss
JOIN
    BatchDetails bd ON qss.batch_id = bd.batch_id
JOIN
    product p ON bd.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN
    site s ON bd.site_id = s.site_id
GROUP BY
    p.name,
    s.name
ORDER BY
    p.name,
    s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment that had both downtime and maintenance in 2025 with their type and location
sql:
WITH EquipmentWithDowntime AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ed.equipment_id
    FROM
        equipment_downtime AS ed
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ed.start_time) = 2025
),
EquipmentWithMaintenance AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        em.equipment_id
    FROM
        equipment_maintenance AS em
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM em.scheduled_date) = 2025
)
SELECT
    e.name AS equipment_name,
    et.name AS equipment_type,
    e.work_center_id AS equipment_location
FROM
    equipment AS e
JOIN
    equipment_type AS et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
JOIN
    EquipmentWithDowntime AS ewd ON e.equipment_id = ewd.equipment_id
JOIN
    EquipmentWithMaintenance AS ewm ON e.equipment_id = ewm.equipment_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all raw materials from approved Indian suppliers used in batches with yield below 96%
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    rm.name
FROM
    raw_material AS rm
JOIN
    batch_material_usage AS bmu ON rm.material_id = bmu.material_id
JOIN
    batch AS b ON bmu.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN
    material_lot AS ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN
    supplier AS s ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE
    b.yield_pct < 96.0
    AND s.is_approved = TRUE
    AND s.contact_email LIKE '%.in'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full deviation-to-CAPA chain: deviation number, type, severity, batch, product, CAPA status, and owner
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  dt.severity,
  b.batch_number AS batch,
  p.name AS product,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  c.owner_id AS capa_owner_id
FROM deviation AS d
LEFT JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON d.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost by scrap reason category and production line name?
sql:
SELECT
  sr.category AS scrap_reason_category,
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
GROUP BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
ORDER BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches where in-process checks failed with the test type, batch number, and product
sql:
SELECT
  tt.name AS test_type,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM in_process_check AS ipc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON ipc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN test_type AS tt
  ON ipc.test_type_id = tt.test_type_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  ipc.passed = FALSE
LIMIT 1000

question: For each site, show number of batches, number of scrap events, and total scrap cost in 2025
sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS site_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.batch_id) AS number_of_batches,
  COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS number_of_scrap_events,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM site AS s
JOIN batch AS b
  ON s.site_id = b.site_id
JOIN scrap_event AS se
  ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
WHERE
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM se.scrap_date) = 2025
GROUP BY
  s.site_id,
  s.name
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production lines had the worst OEE and highest scrap rate?
sql:
WITH LineOEE AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        AVG(or_rec.oee_pct) AS average_oee
    FROM
        production_line AS pl
    JOIN
        oee_record AS or_rec ON pl.line_id = or_rec.line_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
),
LineScrapRate AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        (SUM(COALESCE(se.quantity, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(b.batch_size), 0)) AS scrap_rate_pct
    FROM
        production_line AS pl
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON pl.line_id = b.line_id
    LEFT JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
)
SELECT
    lo.line_name,
    lo.average_oee,
    lsr.scrap_rate_pct
FROM
    LineOEE AS lo
JOIN
    LineScrapRate AS lsr ON lo.line_id = lsr.line_id
ORDER BY
    lo.average_oee ASC,
    lsr.scrap_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all material lots used in batch BN-2025-013 with material name, supplier, and lot status
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name AS material_name,
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  ml.status AS lot_status
FROM batch b
JOIN batch_material_usage bmu
  ON b.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
JOIN material_lot ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN raw_material rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
JOIN supplier s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
LIMIT 1000

question: List open CAPAs with their deviation details, affected batch, product, and due date
sql:
SELECT
  c.capa_number,
  c.description AS capa_description,
  c.due_date,
  d.deviation_number,
  d.description AS deviation_description,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM capa AS c
JOIN deviation AS d
  ON c.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  c.status = 'open' AND d.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the top 5 scrap reasons by total cost with their category
sql:
SELECT
  sr.name,
  sr.category,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
GROUP BY
  sr.name,
  sr.category
ORDER BY
  total_cost DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: For each product, show total batches produced, batches rejected, and average yield
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  COUNT(b.batch_id) AS total_batches_produced,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'rejected' THEN b.batch_id END) AS batches_rejected,
  AVG(b.yield_pct) AS average_yield
FROM product AS p
JOIN batch AS b
  ON p.product_id = b.product_id
GROUP BY
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show sales orders with customer name, product name, and shipment status
sql:
SELECT
  so.order_number,
  c.name AS customer_name,
  p.name AS product_name,
  s.status AS shipment_status
FROM sales_order AS so
JOIN customer AS c
  ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN sales_order_line AS sol
  ON so.order_id = sol.order_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON sol.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN shipment AS s
  ON so.order_id = s.order_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which equipment had calibration failures and what batches were running at the time?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  e.name AS equipment_name,
  b.batch_number,
  cr.calibration_date
FROM calibration_record AS cr
JOIN equipment AS e
  ON cr.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
JOIN batch_step_execution AS bse
  ON e.equipment_id = bse.equipment_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bse.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
  cr.passed = FALSE AND bse.start_time <= cr.calibration_date AND (
    bse.end_time IS NULL OR bse.end_time >= cr.calibration_date
  )
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events caused by operator error with the operator name, batch, and product
sql:
SELECT
  se.reported_by,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  sr.name = 'Operator Error'
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare yield trends between US and India sites by month in 2025
sql:
WITH MonthlyYield AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', ya.period_start)::date AS month_start,
        s.name AS site_name,
        ya.avg_yield_pct AS yield_percentage
    FROM
        yield_analysis ya
    JOIN
        site s ON ya.site_id = s.site_id
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ya.period_start) = 2025
        AND s.name IN ('PharmaCorp US Plant', 'PharmaCorp India Plant')
)
SELECT
    my.month_start,
    AVG(CASE WHEN my.site_name = 'PharmaCorp US Plant' THEN my.yield_percentage END) AS us_avg_yield_pct,
    AVG(CASE WHEN my.site_name = 'PharmaCorp India Plant' THEN my.yield_percentage END) AS india_avg_yield_pct
FROM
    MonthlyYield my
GROUP BY
    my.month_start
ORDER BY
    my.month_start
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete batch cost breakdown for all rejected batches with product names
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  b.batch_number,
  bc.cost_type,
  bc.amount,
  bc.recorded_date,
  bc.notes
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
ORDER BY
  p.name,
  b.batch_number,
  bc.cost_type
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show materials supplied, lots rejected, batches affected by their material quality issues, and any open CAPAs
sql:
WITH SupplierMaterials AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT rm.name, ', ') AS materials_supplied
    FROM
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN
        supplier_material sm ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
    LEFT JOIN
        raw_material rm ON sm.material_id = rm.material_id
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id
),
RejectedLots AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        COUNT(ml.lot_id) AS lots_rejected
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    WHERE
        ml.status = 'rejected'
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id
),
AffectedBatches AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT oos.batch_id) AS batches_affected_by_material_issues
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    JOIN
        qc_sample qs ON ml.lot_id = qs.lot_id
    JOIN
        qc_oos_event oos ON qs.sample_id = oos.sample_id
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id
),
OpenCAPAs AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.capa_id) AS open_capas
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    JOIN
        qc_sample qs ON ml.lot_id = qs.lot_id
    JOIN
        qc_oos_event oos ON qs.sample_id = oos.sample_id
    JOIN
        capa c ON oos.oos_id = c.oos_id
    WHERE
        c.status = 'open'
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id
)
SELECT
    s.name AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(sm.materials_supplied, 'No materials supplied') AS materials_supplied,
    COALESCE(rl.lots_rejected, 0) AS lots_rejected,
    COALESCE(ab.batches_affected_by_material_issues, 0) AS batches_affected_by_material_issues,
    COALESCE(oc.open_capas, 0) AS open_capas
FROM
    supplier s
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierMaterials sm ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    RejectedLots rl ON s.supplier_id = rl.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    AffectedBatches ab ON s.supplier_id = ab.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    OpenCAPAs oc ON s.supplier_id = oc.supplier_id
ORDER BY
    s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full traceability for batch BN-2025-001: materials used, QC results, yield at each stage, and total cost
sql:
WITH TargetBatch AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number
    FROM
        batch AS b
    WHERE
        b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-001'
),
BatchSummary AS (
    SELECT
        'Batch Summary' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        b.start_date AS event_timestamp,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS stage_or_step_name,
        'Batch started on ' || b.start_date::DATE || ' and ended on ' || b.end_date::DATE AS description,
        b.batch_size AS input_quantity,
        b.yield_quantity AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        b.yield_pct AS yield_percentage,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS cost_amount,
        b.status,
        'Batch Size: ' || b.batch_size || ' | Final Yield Quantity: ' || b.yield_quantity || ' | Final Yield %: ' || b.yield_pct AS additional_detail_1,
        'Status: ' || b.status || ' | Released Date: ' || COALESCE(b.released_date::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        'Supervisor: ' || COALESCE(b.supervisor_id::TEXT, 'N/A') || ' | Released By: ' || COALESCE(b.released_by::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON tb.batch_id = b.batch_id
),
MaterialUsage AS (
    SELECT
        'Material Usage' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        bmu.dispensed_at AS event_timestamp,
        ps.name AS stage_or_step_name,
        'Material ' || bmu.material_id || ' (Lot ' || bmu.lot_id || ') used' AS description,
        bmu.planned_quantity AS input_quantity,
        bmu.actual_quantity AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS cost_amount,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS status,
        'Planned: ' || bmu.planned_quantity || ' | Actual: ' || bmu.actual_quantity || ' ' || COALESCE(bmu.uom_id::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_1,
        'Verified by: ' || COALESCE(bmu.verified_by::TEXT, 'N/A') || ' | Dispensed by: ' || COALESCE(bmu.dispensed_by::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        NULL::TEXT AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_material_usage AS bmu ON tb.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON bmu.step_id = ps.step_id
),
StageYield AS (
    SELECT
        'Stage Yield' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        byld.measured_at AS event_timestamp,
        byld.stage AS stage_or_step_name,
        'Yield measured at ' || byld.stage || ' stage' AS description,
        byld.input_quantity,
        byld.output_quantity,
        byld.waste_quantity,
        byld.yield_pct AS yield_percentage,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS cost_amount,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS status,
        'Input: ' || byld.input_quantity || ' | Output: ' || byld.output_quantity || ' | Waste: ' || byld.waste_quantity AS additional_detail_1,
        'Yield %: ' || byld.yield_pct AS additional_detail_2,
        'Measured by: ' || COALESCE(byld.measured_by::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_yield AS byld ON tb.batch_id = byld.batch_id
),
Deviations AS (
    SELECT
        'Deviation' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        d.reported_date AS event_timestamp,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS stage_or_step_name,
        d.description,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS input_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS cost_amount,
        d.status,
        'Deviation No: ' || d.deviation_number || ' | Impact: ' || COALESCE(d.impact_assessment, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_1,
        'Root Cause: ' || COALESCE(d.root_cause, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        'Immediate Action: ' || COALESCE(d.immediate_action, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        deviation AS d ON tb.batch_id = d.batch_id
),
BatchHolds AS (
    SELECT
        'Batch Hold' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        bh.hold_date AS event_timestamp,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS stage_or_step_name,
        bh.hold_reason AS description,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS input_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS cost_amount,
        bh.disposition AS status,
        'Hold Type: ' || COALESCE(bh.hold_type, 'N/A') || ' | Released: ' || COALESCE(bh.released_date::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_1,
        'Notes: ' || COALESCE(bh.notes, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        'Released by: ' || COALESCE(bh.released_by::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_hold AS bh ON tb.batch_id = bh.batch_id
),
ScrapEvents AS (
    SELECT
        'Scrap Event' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        se.scrap_date AS event_timestamp,
        ps.name AS stage_or_step_name,
        se.description,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS input_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS output_quantity,
        se.quantity AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        se.cost_impact AS cost_amount,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS status,
        'Scrap Quantity: ' || se.quantity || ' | Cost Impact: ' || COALESCE(se.cost_impact::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_1,
        'Root Cause: ' || COALESCE(se.root_cause, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        'Corrective Action: ' || COALESCE(se.corrective_action, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON tb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON se.step_id = ps.step_id
),
CostItems AS (
    SELECT
        'Cost Item' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        bc.recorded_date::TIMESTAMP AS event_timestamp,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS stage_or_step_name,
        'Cost Type: ' || bc.cost_type AS description,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS input_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        bc.amount AS cost_amount,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS status,
        'Cost Center: ' || COALESCE(bc.cost_center_id::TEXT, 'N/A') || ' | Currency: ' || COALESCE(bc.currency_id::TEXT, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_1,
        'Notes: ' || COALESCE(bc.notes, 'N/A') AS additional_detail_2,
        NULL::TEXT AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_cost AS bc ON tb.batch_id = bc.batch_id
),
TotalCostSummary AS (
    SELECT
        'Total Cost' AS record_type,
        tb.batch_number,
        MAX(bc.recorded_date)::TIMESTAMP AS event_timestamp,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS stage_or_step_name,
        'Aggregated total cost for batch' AS description,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS input_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS output_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS waste_quantity,
        NULL::NUMERIC AS yield_percentage,
        SUM(bc.amount) AS cost_amount,
        NULL::VARCHAR AS status,
        'Total Cost: ' || SUM(bc.amount) AS additional_detail_1,
        NULL::TEXT AS additional_detail_2,
        NULL::TEXT AS additional_detail_3
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_cost AS bc ON tb.batch_id = bc.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        tb.batch_number
)
SELECT * FROM BatchSummary
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM MaterialUsage
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM StageYield
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM Deviations
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM BatchHolds
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ScrapEvents
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM CostItems
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM TotalCostSummary
ORDER BY
    event_timestamp, record_type
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production areas had environmental excursions that coincided with batch scrap events?
sql:
WITH EnvironmentalExcursions AS (
    SELECT
        em.area_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('day', em.monitoring_date) AS event_day
    FROM
        environmental_monitoring em
    WHERE
        em.within_spec = FALSE
),
BatchScrapEvents AS (
    SELECT
        pl.area_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('day', se.scrap_date) AS event_day
    FROM
        scrap_event se
    JOIN
        batch b ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
    JOIN
        production_line pl ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    pa.name
FROM
    production_area pa
JOIN
    EnvironmentalExcursions ee ON pa.area_id = ee.area_id
JOIN
    BatchScrapEvents bse ON pa.area_id = bse.area_id AND ee.event_day = bse.event_day
LIMIT 1000

question: Show a supplier quality scorecard: lots received, lots rejected, linked batch failures, and total scrap cost caused by their materials
sql:
SELECT
    s.name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(ml.quantity_received) AS lots_received,
    SUM(ml.quantity_rejected) AS lots_rejected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.status = 'rejected' THEN b.batch_id END) AS linked_batch_failures,
    SUM(smd.total_cost) AS total_scrap_cost_caused_by_materials
FROM
    supplier AS s
LEFT JOIN
    material_lot AS ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    scrap_material_detail AS smd ON ml.lot_id = smd.lot_id
LEFT JOIN
    scrap_event AS se ON smd.scrap_id = se.scrap_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch AS b ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
GROUP BY
    s.supplier_id,
    s.name
ORDER BY
    s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: For each product, show the batch with the worst yield, its scrap reasons, deviations raised, and total cost impact
sql:
WITH RankedBatches AS (
    SELECT
        p.product_id,
        p.name AS product_name,
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number,
        b.yield_pct,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.product_id ORDER BY b.yield_pct ASC) AS rn
    FROM
        batch b
    JOIN
        product p ON b.product_id = p.product_id
    WHERE
        b.yield_pct IS NOT NULL
),
WorstYieldBatches AS (
    SELECT
        product_id,
        product_name,
        batch_id,
        batch_number,
        yield_pct
    FROM
        RankedBatches
    WHERE
        rn = 1
),
BatchScrapReasons AS (
    SELECT
        wyb.batch_id,
        STRING_AGG(sr.name, ', ') AS scrap_reasons
    FROM
        WorstYieldBatches wyb
    JOIN
        scrap_event se ON wyb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    JOIN
        scrap_reason sr ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
    GROUP BY
        wyb.batch_id
),
BatchDeviations AS (
    SELECT
        wyb.batch_id,
        STRING_AGG(d.deviation_number, ', ') AS deviations_raised
    FROM
        WorstYieldBatches wyb
    JOIN
        deviation d ON wyb.batch_id = d.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        wyb.batch_id
),
BatchTotalCost AS (
    SELECT
        wyb.batch_id,
        SUM(bc.amount) AS total_cost_impact
    FROM
        WorstYieldBatches wyb
    JOIN
        batch_cost bc ON wyb.batch_id = bc.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        wyb.batch_id
)
SELECT
    wyb.product_name,
    wyb.batch_number,
    wyb.yield_pct AS worst_yield_percentage,
    COALESCE(bsr.scrap_reasons, 'No scrap reasons recorded') AS scrap_reasons,
    COALESCE(bd.deviations_raised, 'No deviations raised') AS deviations_raised,
    COALESCE(btc.total_cost_impact, 0.00) AS total_cost_impact
FROM
    WorstYieldBatches wyb
LEFT JOIN
    BatchScrapReasons bsr ON wyb.batch_id = bsr.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchDeviations bd ON wyb.batch_id = bd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchTotalCost btc ON wyb.batch_id = btc.batch_id
ORDER BY
    wyb.product_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all employees involved in rejected batches: supervisors, operators who reported scrap, and QC analysts who found OOS results
sql:
WITH RejectedBatches AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id
    FROM
        batch AS b
    WHERE
        b.status = 'rejected'
),
Supervisors AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name,
        e.job_title
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON rb.batch_id = b.batch_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON b.supervisor_id = e.employee_id
),
ScrapOperators AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name,
        e.job_title
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON rb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON se.reported_by = e.employee_id
    WHERE
        e.job_title = 'Operator'
),
QCOOSAnalysts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name,
        e.job_title
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        qc_oos_event AS qoe ON rb.batch_id = qoe.batch_id
    JOIN
        qc_test_result AS qtr ON qoe.result_id = qtr.result_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON qtr.tested_by = e.employee_id
)
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    job_title
FROM
    Supervisors
UNION
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    job_title
FROM
    ScrapOperators
UNION
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    job_title
FROM
    QCOOSAnalysts
ORDER BY
    first_name,
    last_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare equipment OEE against scrap rate for each production line, including the most common scrap reason
sql:
WITH LineOEE AS (
    SELECT
        or_rec.line_id,
        AVG(or_rec.oee_pct) AS average_oee
    FROM
        oee_record or_rec
    GROUP BY
        or_rec.line_id
),
LineScrapRate AS (
    SELECT
        st.line_id,
        AVG(st.scrap_rate_pct) AS average_scrap_rate
    FROM
        scrap_trend st
    GROUP BY
        st.line_id
),
LineTopScrapReason AS (
    SELECT
        line_id,
        reason_name
    FROM (
        SELECT
            st.line_id,
            sr.name AS reason_name,
            COUNT(st.top_reason_id) AS reason_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY st.line_id ORDER BY COUNT(st.top_reason_id) DESC, sr.name ASC) AS rn
        FROM
            scrap_trend st
        JOIN
            scrap_reason sr ON st.top_reason_id = sr.reason_id
        GROUP BY
            st.line_id,
            sr.name
    ) AS ranked_reasons
    WHERE
        rn = 1
)
SELECT
    pl.name AS production_line_name,
    lo.average_oee,
    lsr.average_scrap_rate,
    ltsr.reason_name AS most_common_scrap_reason
FROM
    production_line pl
LEFT JOIN
    LineOEE lo ON pl.line_id = lo.line_id
LEFT JOIN
    LineScrapRate lsr ON pl.line_id = lsr.line_id
LEFT JOIN
    LineTopScrapReason ltsr ON pl.line_id = ltsr.line_id
ORDER BY
    pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete deviation history for Tablet Line 1: deviation type, severity, batch affected, root cause, CAPA status, and days to closure
sql:
SELECT
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  dt.severity AS severity,
  b.batch_number AS batch_affected,
  d.root_cause AS root_cause,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (d.closed_date - d.reported_date)) AS days_to_closure
FROM production_line AS pl
JOIN batch AS b
  ON pl.line_id = b.line_id
JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON b.batch_id = dab.batch_id
JOIN deviation AS d
  ON dab.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
WHERE
  pl.name = 'Tablet Line 1'
ORDER BY
  d.reported_date
LIMIT 1000

question: For batch BN-2025-013, show the complete failure chain: what went wrong at each process step, which materials were involved, which deviations were raised, and what the total financial impact was
sql:
WITH TargetBatch AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number
    FROM
        batch AS b
    WHERE
        b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
),
ProcessStepEvents AS (
    SELECT
        tb.batch_id,
        tb.batch_number,
        bse.start_time AS event_timestamp,
        'Process Step' AS event_type,
        ps.step_number,
        ps.name AS event_name,
        ps.description AS event_description,
        bse.end_time AS event_end_time,
        bse.status AS event_status,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_number,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_type,
        NULL::text AS deviation_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS deviation_impact_assessment,
        NULL::text AS deviation_immediate_action,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_quantity,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_cost_impact,
        NULL::text AS scrap_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS scrap_corrective_action,
        NULL::numeric AS total_financial_impact_summary
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        batch_step_execution AS bse ON tb.batch_id = bse.batch_id
    JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON bse.step_id = ps.step_id
),
DeviationEvents AS (
    SELECT
        tb.batch_id,
        tb.batch_number,
        d.reported_date AS event_timestamp,
        'Deviation' AS event_type,
        NULL::integer AS step_number,
        d.deviation_number AS event_name,
        d.description AS event_description,
        d.closed_date AS event_end_time,
        d.status AS event_status,
        d.deviation_number,
        dt.name AS deviation_type,
        d.root_cause AS deviation_root_cause,
        d.impact_assessment AS deviation_impact_assessment,
        d.immediate_action AS deviation_immediate_action,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_quantity,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_cost_impact,
        NULL::text AS scrap_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS scrap_corrective_action,
        NULL::numeric AS total_financial_impact_summary
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        deviation AS d ON tb.batch_id = d.batch_id
    JOIN
        deviation_type AS dt ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
),
ScrapEvents AS (
    SELECT
        tb.batch_id,
        tb.batch_number,
        se.scrap_date AS event_timestamp,
        'Scrap Event' AS event_type,
        ps.step_number,
        'Scrap' AS event_name,
        se.description AS event_description,
        NULL::timestamp AS event_end_time,
        NULL::character varying AS event_status,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_number,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_type,
        NULL::text AS deviation_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS deviation_impact_assessment,
        NULL::text AS deviation_immediate_action,
        se.quantity AS scrap_quantity,
        se.cost_impact AS scrap_cost_impact,
        se.root_cause AS scrap_root_cause,
        se.corrective_action AS scrap_corrective_action,
        NULL::numeric AS total_financial_impact_summary
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON tb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON se.step_id = ps.step_id
),
BatchFinancialSummary AS (
    SELECT
        tb.batch_id,
        tb.batch_number,
        NULL::timestamp AS event_timestamp,
        'Financial Summary' AS event_type,
        NULL::integer AS step_number,
        'Total Financial Impact' AS event_name,
        'Sum of all batch costs and scrap costs' AS event_description,
        NULL::timestamp AS event_end_time,
        NULL::character varying AS event_status,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_number,
        NULL::character varying AS deviation_type,
        NULL::text AS deviation_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS deviation_impact_assessment,
        NULL::text AS deviation_immediate_action,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_quantity,
        NULL::numeric AS scrap_cost_impact,
        NULL::text AS scrap_root_cause,
        NULL::text AS scrap_corrective_action,
        COALESCE(SUM(bc.amount), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(se.cost_impact), 0) AS total_financial_impact_summary
    FROM
        TargetBatch AS tb
    LEFT JOIN
        batch_cost AS bc ON tb.batch_id = bc.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON tb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        tb.batch_id, tb.batch_number
)
SELECT
    batch_number,
    event_timestamp,
    event_type,
    step_number,
    event_name,
    event_description,
    event_end_time,
    event_status,
    deviation_number,
    deviation_type,
    deviation_root_cause,
    deviation_impact_assessment,
    deviation_immediate_action,
    scrap_quantity,
    scrap_cost_impact,
    scrap_root_cause,
    scrap_corrective_action,
    total_financial_impact_summary
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM ProcessStepEvents
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM DeviationEvents
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM ScrapEvents
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM BatchFinancialSummary
    ) AS CombinedEvents
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN event_type = 'Financial Summary' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END,
    event_timestamp,
    event_type,
    step_number
LIMIT 1000

question: Which raw materials have the highest scrap cost association across all batches?
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name AS raw_material_name,
  SUM(smd.total_cost) AS total_scrap_cost_association
FROM raw_material AS rm
JOIN scrap_material_detail AS smd
  ON rm.material_id = smd.material_id
GROUP BY
  rm.name
ORDER BY
  total_scrap_cost_association DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Are there any product recalls?
sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(pr.recall_id) AS number_of_product_recalls
FROM product_recall AS pr
LIMIT 1000

question: Show me batches that have never had any scrap
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number
FROM batch AS b
LEFT JOIN scrap_event AS se
  ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
WHERE
  se.batch_id IS NULL
LIMIT 1000

question: What is our best performing product by yield?
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS product_name,
  AVG(b.yield_pct) AS average_product_yield
FROM product AS p
JOIN batch AS b
  ON p.product_id = b.product_id
GROUP BY
  p.name
ORDER BY
  average_product_yield DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: How much money did we waste on scrap in total?
sql:
SELECT
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
LIMIT 1000

question: Which batch took the longest to produce?
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.end_date - b.start_date)) / 3600 AS production_duration_hours
FROM batch AS b
WHERE
  b.start_date IS NOT NULL AND b.end_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  production_duration_hours DESC
LIMIT 1

question: Show me everything about batch BN-2025-005
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.product_id,
  b.line_id,
  b.order_id,
  b.site_id,
  b.supervisor_id,
  b.released_by,
  b.shift_type_id,
  b.bom_id,
  b.batch_number,
  b.released_date,
  b.start_date,
  b.end_date,
  b.batch_size,
  b.status,
  b.yield_pct,
  b.yield_quantity,
  bc.comment_id,
  bc.commented_by,
  bc.comment_text,
  bc.comment_date,
  bc.comment_type,
  bco.cost_id,
  bco.cost_center_id,
  bco.currency_id,
  bco.recorded_date,
  bco.notes AS batch_cost_notes,
  bco.amount,
  bco.cost_type,
  bh.hold_id,
  bh.released_by AS hold_released_by,
  bh.hold_reason,
  bh.notes AS batch_hold_notes,
  bh.hold_date,
  bh.hold_type,
  bh.disposition,
  bh.released_date AS hold_released_date,
  bre.entry_id,
  bre.document_id,
  bre.entered_by,
  bre.verified_by,
  bre.field_value,
  bre.entry_date,
  bre.verified_date,
  bre.field_name,
  bre.section,
  brw.rework_id,
  brw.hold_id AS rework_hold_id,
  brw.approved_by,
  brw.performed_by,
  brw.result,
  brw.end_date AS rework_end_date,
  brw.start_date AS rework_start_date,
  brw.rework_type,
  brw.additional_cost,
  bse.execution_id,
  bse.equipment_id,
  bse.step_id,
  bse.verified_by AS step_verified_by,
  bse.performed_by AS step_performed_by,
  bse.notes AS step_notes,
  bse.status AS step_status,
  bse.end_time,
  bse.start_time,
  bpr.reading_id,
  bpr.parameter_id,
  bpr.sensor_id,
  bpr.recorded_by,
  bpr.actual_value,
  bpr.within_spec,
  bpr.reading_time,
  by.yield_id,
  by.measured_by,
  by.measured_at,
  by.yield_pct AS batch_yield_pct,
  by.waste_quantity,
  by.output_quantity,
  by.input_quantity,
  by.stage,
  dab.id AS deviation_affected_batch_id,
  dab.deviation_id AS affected_deviation_id,
  dab.impact_description,
  d.deviation_id AS deviation_detail_id,
  d.deviation_type_id,
  d.equipment_id AS deviation_equipment_id,
  d.area_id,
  d.reported_by AS deviation_reported_by,
  d.closed_by AS deviation_closed_by,
  d.priority_id,
  d.deviation_number,
  d.reported_date AS deviation_reported_date,
  d.description AS deviation_description,
  d.immediate_action,
  d.impact_assessment,
  d.root_cause AS deviation_root_cause,
  d.status AS deviation_status,
  d.closed_date AS deviation_closed_date,
  se.scrap_id,
  se.step_id AS scrap_step_id,
  se.equipment_id AS scrap_equipment_id,
  se.reason_id,
  se.uom_id,
  se.reported_by AS scrap_reported_by,
  se.shift_type_id AS scrap_shift_type_id,
  se.scrap_date,
  se.quantity AS scrap_quantity,
  se.cost_impact,
  se.description AS scrap_description,
  se.root_cause AS scrap_root_cause,
  se.corrective_action,
  mbr.mbr_id,
  mbr.status_id AS mbr_status_id,
  mbr.approved_by AS mbr_approved_by,
  mbr.version,
  mbr.effective_date,
  mbr.total_process_steps,
  mbr.expected_yield_pct,
  mbr.document_number
FROM
  batch AS b
LEFT JOIN
  batch_comment AS bc
  ON b.batch_id = bc.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_cost AS bco
  ON b.batch_id = bco.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_hold AS bh
  ON b.batch_id = bh.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_record_entry AS bre
  ON b.batch_id = bre.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_rework AS brw
  ON b.batch_id = brw.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_step_execution AS bse
  ON b.batch_id = bse.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_parameter_reading AS bpr
  ON bse.execution_id = bpr.execution_id
LEFT JOIN
  batch_yield AS by
  ON b.batch_id = by.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON b.batch_id = dab.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  deviation AS d
  ON dab.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN
  scrap_event AS se
  ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
  master_batch_record AS mbr
  ON b.product_id = mbr.product_id AND b.bom_id = mbr.bom_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-005'
LIMIT 1000

question: Are any material lots expiring in the next 6 months?
sql:
SELECT
  ml.lot_id,
  ml.lot_number,
  rm.name AS material_name,
  ml.expiry_date
FROM material_lot AS ml
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
WHERE
  ml.expiry_date > CURRENT_DATE AND ml.expiry_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months'
LIMIT 1000

question: What percentage of batches were rejected?
sql:
SELECT
  (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'rejected' THEN b.batch_id END) * 100.0) / COUNT(b.batch_id) AS percentage_batches_rejected
FROM batch AS b
LIMIT 1000

question: Show me the most expensive scrap event
sql:
SELECT
  scrap_id,
  reason_id,
  reported_by,
  batch_id,
  step_id,
  equipment_id,
  uom_id,
  shift_type_id,
  cost_impact,
  scrap_date,
  quantity,
  description,
  root_cause,
  corrective_action
FROM scrap_event
ORDER BY
  cost_impact DESC
LIMIT 1

question: Which site has the best batch approval rate?
sql:
WITH SiteBatchStats AS (
  SELECT
    s.name AS site_name,
    COUNT(b.batch_id) AS total_batches,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'approved' THEN b.batch_id END) AS approved_batches
  FROM batch AS b
  JOIN site AS s
    ON b.site_id = s.site_id
  GROUP BY
    s.name
)
SELECT
  sbs.site_name,
  (sbs.approved_batches * 100.0) / sbs.total_batches AS batch_approval_rate
FROM SiteBatchStats AS sbs
WHERE
  sbs.total_batches > 0
ORDER BY
  batch_approval_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;
